era: Seattle/Sweden, 2010s-present. Swedish-born, Seattle-connected. Dream-pop-influenced electronic pop with warm, nostalgic textures. The project of David Alexander.

location.formative: Swedish pop melodicism. Scandinavian electronic tradition. Seattle electronic and dream-pop scene. Transatlantic connection.
location.career: Summer Heart -- Electronic Pop. David Alexander. Swedish-born, Seattle-connected. Dream-pop-influenced electronic pop. Warm, nostalgic textures. E=4.

associated_musicians.name: ODESZA
associated_musicians.note: Both electronic pop. ODESZA is cinematic, festival-scale. Summer Heart is intimate, bedroom-scale, dream-pop-influenced.

associated_musicians.name: NAVVI
associated_musicians.note: Both dream-pop-influenced electronic. NAVVI is dark, nocturnal. Summer Heart is warm, golden. Different emotional temperatures.

associated_musicians.name: STRFKR
associated_musicians.note: Both electronic pop. STRFKR is driving, punk-inflected. Summer Heart is flowing, dream-pop-inflected. Different engines.

associated_musicians.name: Briana Marela
associated_musicians.note: Both international connections. Briana Marela to global experimental. Summer Heart bridges Sweden and Seattle.

associated_musicians.name: Mree
associated_musicians.note: Both ethereal, warm pop. Mree is acoustic-rooted. Summer Heart is electronic-rooted. Both gentle, both warm.

theory_nodes.concept: The nostalgic cascade (one hundred and first acoustic element -- flowing, layered synth textures that cascade like summer memories; glistening arpeggios, warm pads, soft vocal melodies; nostalgia in motion; not static warmth but flowing warmth; temporal fusion where past and present merge in electronic texture; dream-pop-influenced electronic pop)
examples: Summer Heart (degree 100) -- cascading synth layers. Dream-pop-influenced. Warm, nostalgic, flowing. 101st acoustic element.
Contrast with the bilingual warmth (degree 99, Kaina) -- cultural fusion. The nostalgic cascade is temporal fusion.
Contrast with the retro-synthetic shimmer (degree 98, Gold Casio) -- static nostalgia. The nostalgic cascade is nostalgia in motion.
One hundred and one acoustic elements at the centennial degree.
theory_nodes.description: The nostalgic cascade is the 101st acoustic element. Flowing synth textures. Nostalgia in motion. Temporal fusion. Dream-pop electronic pop.

ancestors: The bilingual warmth (degree 99, Kaina) -- cultural fusion. The nostalgic cascade is temporal fusion.
The retro-synthetic shimmer (degree 98, Gold Casio) -- static nostalgia. The nostalgic cascade is flowing nostalgia.
genealogy.relationship: One hundred and one acoustic elements across one hundred degrees.

theory_nodes.concept: The transatlantic dreamer (one hundred and first artist-city pattern -- artist operating across the Atlantic, Swedish-born, Seattle-connected; Nordic melancholy meets Pacific warmth; the Atlantic as creative frequency; music that carries both continents; the bridge itself as identity)
examples: Summer Heart (degree 100) -- Swedish-born, Seattle-connected. David Alexander. Nordic and Pacific. 101st artist-city pattern.
Contrast with the diasporic synthesist (degree 99, Kaina) -- inter-American diaspora. The transatlantic dreamer spans continents.
International lineage: Y La Bamba (61), Briana Marela (72), Kaina (99), Summer Heart (100). Four international connections.
theory_nodes.description: The transatlantic dreamer is the 101st artist-city pattern. Swedish-Seattle bridge. Nordic melancholy meets Pacific warmth. The Atlantic as frequency.

ancestors: The diasporic synthesist (degree 99, Kaina) -- inter-American. The transatlantic dreamer is transatlantic.
The self-released synthesist (degree 98, Gold Casio) -- single city. The transatlantic dreamer is two continents.
genealogy.relationship: One hundred and one artist-city patterns across one hundred degrees.

theory_nodes.concept: The centennial degree -- 100th degree, 27.8% of 360; one hundred artists documented; the electronic era carries the engine past the century mark; eleven electronic-adjacent entries in fifteen degrees; the engine reaches triple digits
examples: Degree 100 -- centennial. 27.8% of 360. One hundred artists. 82 genre stages. 101 acoustic elements. 101 patterns.
The electronic era: eleven entries in fifteen degrees (86, 90, 91, 93, 94, 95, 96, 97, 98, 99, 100). Electronic carries the engine past 100.
theory_nodes.description: The centennial degree. 100th degree. 27.8% of 360. One hundred artists. The electronic era carries the engine past the century mark.

ancestors: Genre Stage 80 milestone (degree 98, Gold Casio). The engine approaches 100.
Double milestone at degree 99 (100th element, 100th pattern). The engine reaches triple digits.

theory_nodes.concept: Electronic Pop at Genre Stage 82 -- new genre classification; pop-structured electronic music; dream-pop-influenced; eleventh electronic-adjacent entry; the electronic era deepens past the century mark
examples: Summer Heart (degree 100) -- Electronic Pop at Genre Stage 82.
Distinct from Indie Electronic (96-98), Electronic/R&B (99). Pop structure served by electronic means.
Eleventh electronic-adjacent entry in fifteen degrees. Electronic dominance continues.
theory_nodes.description: Genre Stage 82. Electronic Pop. Pop-structured electronic music. Dream-pop-influenced. Eleventh electronic entry.

ancestors: Electronic/R&B at Genre Stage 81 (degree 99, Kaina). New genre at 100.
genealogy.relationship: Genre Stage 82 at degree 100. Track at 101.

cross_references.relationship: ELECTRONIC POP SPECTRUM. Both electronic pop. ODESZA is cinematic, festival-scale, brass-accented (E=5). Summer Heart is intimate, bedroom-scale, dream-pop-influenced (E=4). The spectrum from arena to bedroom.
DREAM POP PARALLEL. Both dream-pop-influenced electronic. NAVVI is dark, nocturnal, reverb-as-architecture. Summer Heart is warm, golden, nostalgia-as-cascade. Different emotional temperatures.
ELECTRONIC POP CONTRAST. Both electronic pop, both synth-driven. STRFKR is driving, punk-inflected, joyful. Summer Heart is flowing, dream-pop-inflected, nostalgic.
INTERNATIONAL CONNECTION. Both international connections. Briana Marela to global experimental. Summer Heart bridges Sweden and Seattle. The engine's international dimension.
ETHEREAL POP PARALLEL. Both ethereal, warm pop sensibilities. Mree is acoustic-rooted. Summer Heart is electronic-rooted. Both gentle, both warm, different instruments.
